project_type: Vite + React 18 + TypeScript + Tailwind CSS SPA - Nigerian fashion house website
test_framework: No test framework configured (no tests directory)
build_command: cd /projects/sandbox/happy-threads && npx tsc -b && npx vite build
verification_instructions: 1. Run TypeScript compilation: npx tsc -b --noEmit. 2. Run Vite build: npx vite build. 3. Verify all new Pexels IDs return HTTP 200 via curl.
setup_instructions: cd /projects/sandbox/happy-threads && npm install (already done, node_modules exists)
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET mode - full network access available. No Docker needed. No test framework.
contribution_requirements: Create a NEW branch from feat/security-hardening for this PR. User explicitly wants a NEW PR.
key_patterns: Images use the pexels() helper from src/utils/images.ts which constructs Pexels CDN URLs from numeric IDs. The designs catalog is in src/data/designs.ts as a static array. The About section image is in src/components/About.tsx.
directory_structure: src/data/ - data catalog files, src/components/ - React components, src/utils/ - utility functions
